tips.title: Tips for success
tips.realisticTimeline: Pick a realistic timeline. Shorter deadlines help momentum, but keep it achievable.
tips.startSmall: Start small. Even modest contributions build consistency.
tips.nameClearly: Name it clearly. A specific goal feels more tangible and motivating.
